headline: Could Apple Set Revolutionize Tablet Market With 18.8-Inch Foldable iPad?
summary: Apple may be gearing up to introduce an 18.8-inch foldable iPad by 2028. The innovative device is expected to provide users with a seamless experience, similar to using "two iPad Pros side-by-side."

headline: Shaquille O'Neal's $250K 'Accidental' Investment Turns Into A Fortune After Business Booms
summary: Shaquille O'Neal has reaped significant financial rewards from an unintentional investment in Google, contributing to his present net worth of approximately $500 million.
